requirement_topic.en: ECA Type Approval — Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: ECA型式批准——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: ECA型式批准——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecommunications terminal equipment must obtain an ECA type approval certificate from the Ethiopian Communications Authority before importation or sale in Ethiopia, under Proclamation 1148/2019 (Communications Service Proclamation). The ECA approval mark must appear on the product and its packaging. CE marking, FCC authorisation, and CCC certification are not recognised as equivalents by the ECA. Testing must be carried out by an ECA-accredited or internationally recognised laboratory.
summary.zh: 所有无线电发射机及电信终端设备须依据第1148/2019号公告（《通信服务公告》），在进口或于埃塞俄比亚销售前取得埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）颁发的型式批准证书。ECA批准标志须标注于产品及包装上。CE标志、FCC授权和CCC认证均不被ECA视为等同认可。检测须由ECA认可或国际认可实验室完成。
summary.zht: 所有無線電發射機及電信終端設備須依據第1148/2019號公告（《通訊服務公告》），在進口或於衣索比亞銷售前取得衣索比亞通訊管理局（ECA）頒發的型式批准證書。ECA批准標誌須標注於產品及包裝上。CE標誌、FCC授權和CCC認證均不被ECA視為等同認可。檢測須由ECA認可或國際認可實驗室完成。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Communications Authority Type Approval Regulations

summary.en: China MIIT SRRC radio type approval for radio frequency equipment; MIIT network access licence (NAL) for telecommunications terminal equipment; CCC certification for RF equipment within CCC scope. GB standards (e.g. GB 15844, GB 8702) apply domestically. SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are China-domestic only and carry no legal standing with the Ethiopian Communications Authority.
summary.zh: 中国工信部SRRC无线电型式批准适用于射频设备；工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）适用于电信终端设备；CCC认证适用于CCC范围内的射频设备。GB标准（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境内适用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准仅限于中国境内，在埃塞俄比亚通信管理局不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 中國工信部SRRC無線電型式批准適用於射頻設備；工信部電信終端設備進網許可證（NAL）適用於電信終端設備；CCC認證適用於CCC範圍內的射頻設備。GB標準（如GB 15844、GB 8702）在境內適用。SRRC、NAL和CCC批准僅限於中國境內，在衣索比亞通訊管理局不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (China)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — RF equipment in scope (China)

gap.en: Mandatory separate ECA type approval certificate required from the Ethiopian Communications Authority before importation. CE, FCC, and CCC approvals are not accepted. SRRC and NAL have no legal standing in Ethiopia. The ECA approval mark must be displayed on product label and packaging. ECA has been actively enforcing type approval since the 2021 telecom market opening.
gap.zh: 须在进口前另行取得埃塞俄比亚通信管理局（ECA）颁发的强制性型式批准证书。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在埃塞俄比亚不具法律效力。ECA批准标志须标注于产品标签及包装上。自2021年电信市场开放以来，ECA已积极执行型式批准要求。
gap.zht: 須在進口前另行取得衣索比亞通訊管理局（ECA）頒發的強制性型式批准證書。CE、FCC和CCC批准不被接受。SRRC和NAL在衣索比亞不具法律效力。ECA批准標誌須標注於產品標籤及包裝上。自2021年電信市場開放以來，ECA已積極執行型式批准要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ECA type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported or sold in Ethiopia under Proclamation 1148/2019. Chinese SRRC, NAL, and CCC approvals are not recognised by the ECA. A separate ECA type approval process must be completed and the ECA approval mark displayed on the product and packaging before Ethiopian customs clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据第1148/2019号公告，ECA型式批准对于所有在埃塞俄比亚进口或销售的无线电及电信终端设备均属强制要求。中国SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被ECA承认。须完成独立的ECA型式批准程序，并在通过埃塞俄比亚海关前于产品及包装上显示ECA批准标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據第1148/2019號公告，ECA型式批准對於所有在衣索比亞進口或銷售的無線電及電信終端設備均屬強制要求。中國SRRC、NAL和CCC批准不被ECA承認。須完成獨立的ECA型式批准程序，並在通過衣索比亞海關前於產品及包裝上顯示ECA批准標誌。
